## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and agree to the Code of Conduct.
- [ ] Tests added or updated where behavior changed (`packages/core`, `apps/web`, `apps/cli`, etc.).
- [ ] If this changes **user-visible text**, `mn` and `en` in `packages/i18n/src/resources.ts` are updated (or a follow-up issue is linked).
- [ ] If this changes **published workspace packages** in a way users should see in release notes, a Changeset was added (`pnpm changeset`).
